block.title: Create Database Connection
block.text: Setup the database connection in Splunk DB Connect first, then follow the steps below:

input.label: Enter the name of the IP360 database connection defined in Splunk DB Connect
Enter the number of days of history to import into Splunk

block.title: Optional-Severity Ranges
block.text: Setup custom IP360 score ranges for severity settings

input.label: Configure the maximum score for the "Informational" severity setting
Configure the maximum score for the "Low" severity setting
Configure the maximum score for the "Medium" severity setting
Configure the maximum score for the "High" severity setting ("Critical" severities will be defined as any scores above this number)
